description: Canonical eval cases for the Logistics Agent. Pins mode-selection discipline + bonded-warehouse explanation + customs-clearance grounding.

cases.name: Mode selection · urgent + light
cases.input: Need 200 kg of consumer electronics from Shenzhen to Frankfurt in 7 days. Sea or air?
cases.description: Urgent + light + high-value → air freight is the obvious answer. Agent must surface a concrete recommendation with cost, not hedge.

cases.name: Bonded warehouse · re-export use case
cases.input: We import samples that we sometimes re-export back to Asia for QC iteration. Should we be using a bonded warehouse?
cases.description: Re-export samples are the canonical bonded-warehouse use case — duty + VAT are never paid. Agent must make this point clearly.
